name: Cherries & Cream Tiara Cake
recipeInstructions:
Batter:
1. Grease Tiara pan (do not flour).
2. Blend together cake mix, eggs, butter, and water on low speed until moistened.
3. Mix at medium speed for 4 minutes.
4. Pour 2 2/3 cups of batter into the pan (save remaining batter for 8 cupcakes).
5. Bake at 375°F (190°C) for 18-21 minutes.
6. Cool in the pan on a rack for 5-10 minutes, then invert onto a wire rack and allow to cool completely.
Mousse:
1. Gently fold butter flavor into whipped topping until uniform color is achieved.
2. Spread mousse evenly over the cooled cake.
3. Refrigerate for 30 minutes.
4. Spoon cherry pie filling over the mousse, leaving an edge of mousse visible.
5. Chill for an additional 2 hours.
